title: Contxt shared contract
description: The single data contract every Contxt piece builds against: context cards, the Gateway tier-decision envelope, and MCP tool I/O. Define once, freeze early — Pipeline, MCP, and UI code against this (and the mock fixtures) until real data flows.

Tier.description: PRIVATE = crown jewels (local + E2E encrypted, cloud stores ciphertext only). SHARED = cloud-readable, any AI can use it.

Source.description: The ingestion connector the item came from.

Entity.description: A structured entity extracted during distillation.

Encryption.description: Present only on PRIVATE cards at rest in the cloud blind relay. AES-256-GCM payload; the cloud never holds the key. When present, `summary`/`body` are null.

ciphertext.description: base64url-encoded ciphertext of the card content JSON

key_ref.description: Client-side key identifier (ECDH-derived). Never a raw key. Null before key agreement.

ContextCard.description: One distilled unit of context. SHARED cards are served over MCP as-is; PRIVATE cards are decrypted client-side and never leave the device in plaintext.

title.description: Short human label for the card.

summary.description: The distilled, model-written summary — the primary field an AI consumes. Null iff the card is encrypted at rest (see `encryption`).

body.description: Optional fuller distilled text. Null when not distilled or when encrypted at rest.

entities.description: Structured entities extracted during distillation. May be empty.

sensitivity_score.description: Gateway's 0..1 sensitivity estimate that drove the tier decision.

embedding_ref.description: Pointer to this card's vector in the store, e.g. `vec:shared:00001`. Null for PRIVATE cards (indexed on-device only) or before indexing.

encryption.description: Present only for PRIVATE cards stored in the cloud blind relay.

meta.description: Free-form connector metadata (thread id, event id, page id, etc.). Not part of the frozen shape.

TierDecision.description: What the Crown-Jewels Gateway emits per ingested item, BEFORE distillation. Deterministic rules or Gemma produce it. Maps 1:1 to gateway.Decision.

categories.description: Rule categories (money, card, account, phone, health) and/or keyword hits (kw:loan) and/or Gemma categories.

source_ref.description: Optional pointer back to the ingested item this decision is about.

GetContextResponse.description: MCP `get_context` output. Only SHARED cards are ever served from the cloud.

DraftReplyRequest.description: MCP `draft_reply` input — the demo's one agentic action.

email.description: The email text to reply to.

used_card_ids.description: ids of the context cards that grounded the draft.

$comment: Root ref points at ContextCard so a bare document validates as a single card; the reusable shapes live under $defs.
